CustomObject.description: Platform event to trigger guest-context document rendering as Automated Process user. Published by the docGenRunner LWC when running in Experience Cloud guest context, consumed by DocGenGuestRenderTrigger which enqueues a queueable. Required because Blob.toPdf() resolves image URLs against the lightning subdomain that guests have no session against — running render under Automated Process restores image fetching.
CustomObject.label: DocGen Guest Render
